name: HRT_PERSON_COMPETENCIES_V
query: SELECT ITEM.PROFILE_ITEM_ID COMPETENCE_ELEMENT_ID, ITEM.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, ITEM.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, 'PERSONAL' AS TYPE, ITEM.CONTENT_ITEM_ID COMPETENCE_ID, NULL AS MEMBER_COMPETENCE_SET_ID, ITEM.RATING_LEVEL_ID1 AS PROFICIENCY_LEVEL_ID, NULL AS HIGH_PROFICIENCY_LEVEL_ID, NULL AS WEIGHTING_LEVEL_ID, NULL AS RATING_LEVEL_ID, PROFILE.PERSON_ID AS PERSON_ID, NULL AS ENTERPRISE_ID, NULL AS JOB_ID, NULL AS VALID_GRADE_ID, NULL AS POSITION_ID, NULL AS ORGANIZATION_ID, NULL AS WORK_ITEM_ID, NULL AS COMPETENCE_SET_ID, ITEM.PARENT_PROFILE_ITEM_ID PARENT_COMPETENCE_ELEMENT_ID, NULL AS ACTIVITY_VERSION_ID, NULL AS ASSESSMENT_ID, NULL AS ASSESSMENT_TYPE_ID, ITEM.MANDATORY, ITEM.DATE_FROM EFFECTIVE_DATE_FROM, ITEM.DATE_TO EFFECTIVE_DATE_TO, NULL AS GROUP_COMPETENCE_TYPE, ITEM.ITEM_TEXT30_7 AS COMPETENCE_TYPE, ITEM.ITEM_NUMBER_3 AS SEQUENCE_NUMBER, ITEM.ITEM_NUMBER_4 AS NORMAL_ELAPSE_DURATION, ITEM.ITEM_TEXT30_5 AS NORMAL_ELAPSE_DURATION_UNIT, ITEM.ITEM_TEXT30_8 AS SOURCE_OF_PROFICIENCY_LEVEL, NULL AS LINE_SCORE, ITEM.ITEM_DATE_1 AS CERTIFICATION_DATE, ITEM.ITEM_TEXT30_9 AS CERTIFICATION_METHOD, ITEM.ITEM_DATE_2 AS NEXT_CERTIFICATION_DATE, ITEM.ITEM_TEXT2000_2 AS COMMENTS, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE1, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE2, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE3, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE4, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE5, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE6, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE7, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE8, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE9, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE10, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE11, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE12, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE13, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE14, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE15, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE16, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE17, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE18, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE19, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE20, ITEM.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, ITEM.LAST_UPDATED_BY, ITEM.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, ITEM.CREATED_BY, ITEM.CREATION_DATE, NULL AS OBJECT_ID, NULL AS OBJECT_NAME, PROFILE.PARTY_ID AS PARTY_ID, NULL AS QUALIFICATION_TYPE_ID, NULL AS UNIT_STANDARD_TYPE, NULL AS STATUS, ITEM.INFORMATION_CATEGORY, ITEM.INFORMATION1, ITEM.INFORMATION2, ITEM.INFORMATION3, ITEM.INFORMATION4, ITEM.INFORMATION5, ITEM.INFORMATION6, ITEM.INFORMATION7, ITEM.INFORMATION8, ITEM.INFORMATION9, ITEM.INFORMATION10, ITEM.INFORMATION11, ITEM.INFORMATION12, ITEM.INFORMATION13, ITEM.INFORMATION14, ITEM.INFORMATION15, ITEM.INFORMATION16, ITEM.INFORMATION17, ITEM.INFORMATION18, ITEM.INFORMATION19, ITEM.INFORMATION20, NULL AS ACHIEVED_DATE, NULL AS APPR_LINE_SCORE, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE21, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE22, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE23, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE24, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE25, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE26, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE27, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE28, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE29, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE30, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER1, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER2, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER3, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER4, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER5, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER6, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER7, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER8, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER9, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER10, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER11, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER12, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER13, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER14, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER15, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER16, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER17, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER18, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER19, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER20, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_DATE1, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_DATE2, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_DATE3, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_DATE4, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_DATE5, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_DATE6, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_DATE7, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_DATE8, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_DATE9, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_DATE10, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_DATE11, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_DATE12, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_DATE13, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_DATE14, ITEM.ATTRIBUTE_DATE15 FROM HRT_PROFILE_ITEMS ITEM, HRT_PROFILES_B PROFILE, HRT_CONTENT_TYPES_B CTYPE WHERE PROFILE.PROFILE_ID = ITEM.PROFILE_ID AND ITEM.CONTENT_TYPE_ID = CTYPE.CONTENT_TYPE_ID AND ITEM.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = CTYPE.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND CTYPE.CONTEXT_NAME = 'COMPETENCY' AND PROFILE.PROFILE_USAGE_CODE = 'P'
